subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write to the Hájí was noted, all praise and commendation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب حاجی نگاشتید ملاحظه گردید جمیع تعریف و توصیف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
